acceptance.command: Run the repository Quick gate while this corrective unit is current.
acceptance.proof: The invariant rejects the accepted M1 replacement itself as current but permits this distinct, valid later unit.

acceptance.command: Review the README opening and run the repository Quick and portable workflow-contract gates.
acceptance.proof: The accepted functional baseline, pending publication, and deferred Milestone 7 accessibility suite are stated without contradiction.

commit_policy: Commit the reviewed unit transition first, then commit the validator correction and passing evidence. Do not mix implementation or publication changes.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Clarify that accepted milestone state and a later current unit are distinct workflow facts.
Validate the already-landed accepted-functional and publication-pending first-hop status.
The correction implements the existing distinction between terminal accepted state and later current authority.
instruction_surfaces.validation: Review the installed skill before acceptance.

non_scope: Changing product, runtime, device, Manifold, Quest, LSL, accessibility, media, relay, ADB, or File Manager behavior.
Erasing or resuming the blocked README status-alignment unit.
Changing the external work-environment workflow contract.
objective: Correct the repository planning invariant so an accepted supersession replacement may coexist with a distinct later current unit, then validate the already-landed truthful README status alignment.
outputs: A bounded repository-validator correction with regression coverage through the live current-unit state.
Passing validation for the truthful first-hop M1 status.
